allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''total portals:'''', len\(d\)\); p=d[:3]; print\(json.dumps\(p, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ss=d[''''signs'''']; print\(''''signs:'''', len\(ss\)\); print\(json.dumps\(ss[:2], indent=2\)\)" curl -s "http://localhost:7070/api/v1/dropped")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''keys:'''', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); items=d.get\(''''topItems'''', d.get\(''''items'''',[]\)\); print\(''''top 3:'''', items[:3]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); types=d[''''types'''']; named=[t for t in types if not t[''''name''''].startswith\(''''hash:''''\)]; print\(f''''total types: {len\(types\)}, named: {len\(named\)}, unnamed: {len\(types\)-len\(named\)}''''\); print\(''''top 5 named:'''', json.dumps\(named[:5], indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''cells:'''', len\(d.get\(''''cells'''',[]\)\), ''''max:'''', d.get\(''''maxCount''''\)\)" echo)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cs=d.get\(''''containers'''',[]\); print\(''''count:'''', len\(cs\)\)")
Bash(cmd /c "cd /D D:\\work\\temp\\viewer && mvn package -q && echo BUILD_OK" 2>&1)
Bash(cmd /c "cd /D D:\\work\\temp\\viewer && mvn package 2>&1 | findstr /i \\"error warn BUILD\\" && echo DONE")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location 'D:\\work\\temp\\viewer'; $result = mvn package 2>&1; $result | Select-String -Pattern 'ERROR|WARN|BUILD|error' | Out-String; Write-Host \('Exit: ' + $LASTEXITCODE\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "cd 'D:\\work\\temp\\viewer'; mvn package 2>&1 | Select-String 'ERROR|BUILD SUCCESS|BUILD FAILURE'")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; \(Get-Command mvnw.cmd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; ls 'D:\\work\\temp\\viewer\\mvnw*'")
Bash(cmd /c "cd /D D:\\work\\temp\\viewer && mvn clean package -q 2>&1 && echo BUILD_SUCCESS || echo BUILD_FAILED")
Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location 'D:\\work\\temp\\viewer'; & mvn clean package 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match 'ERROR|BUILD|error:' } | Select-Object -Last 20")

Bash(powershell -Command "ls 'C:\\Program Files\\*maven*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ls 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\*maven*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ls 'C:\\maven*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ls 'C:\\tools\\*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 10")
Bash(cmd /c "cd /D D:\\work\\temp\\viewer && mvn clean package > D:\\work\\temp\\mvn-build.txt 2>&1 && echo SUCCESS >> D:\\work\\temp\\mvn-build.txt || echo FAILED >> D:\\work\\temp\\mvn-build.txt")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id \(netstat -ano | Select-String ':7070 ' | ForEach-Object { \(\($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1]\).Trim\(\) } | Select-Object -First 1\) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'done'")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host 'killed java'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Invoke-WebRequest 'http://localhost:7070/api/v1/world-summary' -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty data | Select-Object world_version, parse_duration_ms, zdo_total, config_loaded; \(Invoke-WebRequest 'http://localhost:7070/api/v1/world-summary' -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).data.stats | ConvertTo-Json")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Host 'done'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Start-Process java -ArgumentList ''-Xmx3g'',''-jar'',''target/world-viewer-1.0.0.jar'',''../ComfyEra14.db'',''--no-browser'' -RedirectStandardOutput ''logs/run.log'' -RedirectStandardError ''logs/run-err.log'' -NoNewWindow; Write-Host ''started''")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d[''''data'''']; print\(''''regionsLoaded:'''', m[''''regionsLoaded'''']\); print\(''''clusters:'''', len\(m[''''portalClusters'''']\)\); print\(''''zoneBudgets:'''', len\(m[''''zoneBudgets'''']\)\); print\(''''hotspots:'''', len\(m[''''hotspots'''']\)\); print\(''''droppedHotspots:'''', len\(m[''''droppedHotspots'''']\)\); print\(''''densityStats:'''', m[''''densityStats'''']\); print\(''''droppedDensityStats:'''', m[''''droppedDensityStats'''']\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); types={}; [types.__setitem__\(x[''''prefab''''], types.get\(x[''''prefab''''],0\)+1\) for x in d[''''data'''']]; print\(json.dumps\(types, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''total={d[""total""]} critical={d[""critical""]} high={d[""high""]} medium={d[""medium""]} low={d[""low""]}''''\); [print\(f''''  [{a[""severity""]}] {a[""type""]}: {a[""title""]}''''\) for a in d[''''data''''][:3]]" echo "=== STRUCTURES ===")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[''''data'''']; s=d[''''stats'''']; print\(f''''structs total={s[""structures""][""total""]} active={s[""structures""][""active""]}''''\); print\(f''''alerts critical={s[""alerts""][""critical""]} high={s[""alerts""][""high""]} medium={s[""alerts""][""medium""]} low={s[""alerts""][""low""]}''''\)" echo "=== ENTITIES ===")
